guardrails: Do not apply production code changes from this lab.
Do not run exploit payloads against external targets.
Keep validation inside local intentionally vulnerable services.
post_change_validation: Confirm the vulnerable route no longer accepts query-shaping input.
Confirm scanner output no longer reports the same finding.
Confirm evidence bundle records before-and-after status.
items.recommended_change: Prepare a code patch that replaces string-built SQL with parameterized query execution.
rollback: Revert the patch branch or commit if tests fail.
Restore the previous lab image only inside the local lab environment.
steps: Identify the vulnerable query construction path.
Replace string interpolation or concatenation with parameterized query APIs.
Add a regression test for expected safe query behavior.
items.title: Replace unsafe query construction with parameterized query

guardrails: Do not suppress dependency findings without owner approval.
post_change_validation: Confirm dependency scanner no longer reports the same vulnerable version.
Confirm no new high-priority dependency findings were introduced.
items.recommended_change: Prepare a dependency upgrade plan and validate compatibility inside the lab.
rollback: Restore the previous dependency lockfile if the upgrade breaks compatibility.
Document why the finding remains accepted if no safe upgrade exists.
steps: Confirm the affected dependency is installed and used by the service.
Check whether the vulnerable component is reachable in the lab context.
Update the dependency manifest in a branch.
Run unit tests and dependency scan again.
items.title: Review and upgrade vulnerable dependency

guardrails: Do not rotate real credentials unless real credential exposure is confirmed.
post_change_validation: Rerun the secret scanner in the lab.
Confirm the finding remains classified as non-production fixture evidence.
items.recommended_change: Keep the finding low priority and document why it is treated as fixture/test data.
rollback: Revert documentation or fixture naming changes if they break tests.
steps: Confirm the file path is test-only or fixture-only.
Confirm the detected value is not a real credential.
Rename obvious fake secrets where practical to reduce scanner noise.
Add a comment or fixture naming convention that clearly marks the sample as non-production.
items.title: Document likely test fixture
